scripts.build: npm run build:wasm && npm run build:transpile
scripts.build:ci: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p='target/wasm32-wasip1/release/refarm_heartwood.wasm';if(fs.existsSync(p)){console.log('[heartwood] WASM binary found. Running transpile...');require('child_process').execSync('npm run build:transpile',{stdio:'inherit',shell:true})}else{console.log('[heartwood] WASM binary not found at '+p+'. Using pre-compiled pkg/ artifacts. To rebuild: cargo build --target wasm32-wasip1 --release && npm run build:transpile')}"
